meta.description: Classifies every supported Megaplan step/attempt transition, arnold.workflow module, pinned arnold.pipeline.native construct, and evidence_pack step with owner, support status, C2-C6 migration milestone, exception metadata, and visible non-conformant status where applicable.

owners.wbc: Workflow Boundary Contracts — owns declarations, schemas, evidence profiles, findings, and boundary matrices.
owners.run_authority: Run Authority — owns authority facts, views, routing decisions, and execution verdicts.
owners.maintenance: Maintenance — owns lifecycle, status, repair queues, incident ledger, watchdog, and cloud status.

support_statuses.supported: Fully supported in the current codebase with real producer code paths.
support_statuses.partial: Partially supported — some code paths exist but coverage is incomplete or contains known gaps.
support_statuses.planned: Schema/contract declared but no producer emission path yet exists. Targeted for C2-C6 migration.
support_statuses.deprecated: No longer actively maintained; retained for backward compatibility only.
support_statuses.non_conformant: Visible non-conformance — known deviation from contract expectations.

migration_milestones.c2: C2: Schema-aware routing and typed step completion boundary.
migration_milestones.c3: C3: Semantic replay with durable state and evidence replay alignment.
migration_milestones.c4: C4: Authority attestation and human-in-the-loop override formalization.
migration_milestones.c5: C5: Full-suite compatibility replay with evidence-pack attestation.
migration_milestones.c6: C6: Production migration with real producer coverage for all declared contracts.

families.description: Pinned native pipeline constructs from arnold/pipeline/native/ providing compile_pipeline, decision, parallel, phase, and pipeline decorators used by evidence_pack and other pipelines.

entries.description: Compiles a native pipeline generator function into a NativeProgram IR for execution. Pinned stability: this is the canonical compilation entrypoint.
Decorator for decision nodes in native pipelines with vocabulary, human_gate, and override_routes support. Used by evidence_pack verdict_is_fail and human_review_decision.
NativeProgram intermediate representation produced by compile_pipeline. The compiled form of native pipeline definitions.
Construct for parallel fanout stages with reducer support. Used by evidence_pack for content_validators parallel block.
Decorator for phase steps in native pipelines with typed Port consumes/produces annotations. Used by all evidence_pack phase functions.
Decorator for top-level native pipeline generators. Used by evidence_pack_native.

families.description: Schema-only and schema-plus-validation modules in arnold/workflow/ that define the public contract surface for workflow identity, ordering, provenance, payloads, refs, and evidence.

entries.description: Workflow authoring utilities and conventions.
BoundaryContract, BoundaryReceipt, AuthorityRecord, BoundaryOutcome, BoundaryPhase, SemanticFinding, FindingSeverity types for evidence-based workflow boundary tracking.
Programmatic workflow construction helpers.
CompileDiagnosticError, compile_pattern_block, compile_pipeline functions for compiling workflow DSL to executable form.
Diagnostic utilities for workflow analysis and troubleshooting.
Discovery subpackage with judge_manifest, manifest, and trust modules for workflow discovery.
dry_run and to_data functions for simulating workflow execution without side effects.
Pipeline, Step, Route, Capability, Input, Output types defining the workflow authoring DSL. Includes INTERNAL_EXPORTS, PROVISIONAL_EXPORTS, PUBLIC_EXPORTS.

Schema-only DurableRef dataclass with enums (PrivacyClass, AvailabilityClass, EncryptionScope, RetentionClass, AccessScope) and validators for retrievability, digest handling, tenant/workflow scope, encryption/access scope, privacy class, and secret exclusion.

Schema-only ExecutionAttemptLedger covering identity (AttemptIdentity), ordering (LedgerPosition), provenance (AttemptProvenance), runtime adapter (RuntimeAdapter), version anchoring (VersionSet), grant/decision refs (GrantRef), idempotency keys, nine typed payload refs, persistence-failure diagnostics, and reconciliation diagnostics.
ExpressionRef and expression_ref helper for typed expression references in workflow manifests.
Handler semantics definitions for workflow step execution contracts.
inspect_manifest, to_dot, to_yaml for introspecting workflow manifest structure.
Bridge module re-exporting arnold.manifest.manifests types (WorkflowManifest, WorkflowNode, WorkflowEdge, etc.) for workflow manifest handling.

wbc.inline.v1 and wbc.retention.v1 schema validation with 16 KiB canonical JSON inline threshold, retention/redaction/tombstone/legal-hold rules, access-audit requirements, and digest-only preservation rejection.
EdgeRef, HookRef, ImportRef, ManifestCoordinate, ManifestCursor, NodeRef, SourceRef, SourceSpan, ValueRef, and helper functions for typed workflow references.
Workflow registry for discovering and loading workflow definitions.
Stable row ID constants (S2_PREP_ROW_ID, S2_PLAN_ROW_ID, S2_CRITIQUE_ROW_ID, S2_GATE_ROW_ID, S2_REVISE_ROW_ID, S3 tiebreaker rows, S4_EXECUTE_ROW_ID) for semantic evidence table references.

CheckWorkflowSourceResult, SourceCompileError, SourceCompilationError, check_workflow_file, check_workflow_source, compile_workflow_file, compile_workflow_source, lower_workflow_file, lower_workflow_source for compiling workflow source files.
ManifestValidationError, ManifestValidationIssue, RuntimeRef, check_neutral_import_boundary, validate_manifest for validating workflow manifests.
Additional workflow validation logic.

families.description: Model-less verification pipeline for persisted evidence-pack JSON artifacts. Includes both projected shell steps and native phase implementations.

entries.description: Compiles the evidence_pack_native pipeline generator into a NativeProgram. This is the canonical entrypoint for native execution.
Human-gate decision node with resume_input_schema. Reads human_input or checkpoint status to determine emit/failed routing. Override routes map emit→emit_attestation, failed→None.
Decision node reading verdict.json to determine fail/pass routing. Returns 'fail' on missing/invalid verdict as defensive default.
Barrier-join reducer for content_validators parallel fanout. Merges all validator outputs and emits StepResult routing to reduce.

Five parallel validator variants: structural_audit, budget_enforcement, suspension_propagation, by_ref_validation, human_review_gate. Each produces a checkpoint artifact with pass/fail status and diagnostic.
Produces attestation.json with final verdict and all checkpoint results. Terminal step of evidence-pack pipeline.
Native-phase adapter placeholder used by the projected shell pipeline definition. Routes to halt as a passthrough.
Human review gate: suspends for human input on first invocation, processes approval/rejection on resume. Produces checkpoint with human_review_gate status.
Loads evidence_pack_path, validates against EVIDENCE_PACK_SCHEMA, writes normalized copy to artifact root. Produces evidence_pack output with checkpoint_count.
Collects all checkpoint results, produces verdict.json with pass/fail determination. Routes to emit_attestation on pass, human_review on fail.

families.description: Step handlers and boundary transitions in arnold_pipelines/megaplan that produce boundary receipts, phase results, state deltas, and history entries.

entries.description: Anchor state management for timeout and resume anchors in execute phase.
Override command handler dispatching abort, force-proceed, replan, recover-blocked, resume-clarify, adopt-execution actions.
Critique handler dispatches parallel critiques, runs evaluations, triggers adaptive routing, emits critique_to_gate boundary receipt via _finish_step auto-match.
Gate handler evaluates quality signals, emits gate_to_revise boundary receipt for iterate/retry/revise outcomes via _finish_step auto-match.
Plan handler produces plan.md, emits plan_to_critique boundary receipt via _finish_step auto-match.
Prep handler produces research.md and brief.md, emits prep_to_plan boundary receipt via _finish_step auto-match.
Revise handler produces revised_plan.md and revision_log.md, emits revise_to_critique boundary receipt via _finish_step auto-match.
Parent rejoin promotion resumes parent workflow after tiebreaker decision. No phase_result required.
Replan authority boundary: replan decision authorized with evidence. Receipt not required.
Tiebreaker challenger produces challenge_findings.json, emits boundary receipt.
Tiebreaker decision produces tiebreaker_decisions.json with proceed/iterate/escalate outcomes, emits boundary receipt with parent rejoin promotion.
Tiebreaker researcher produces research_findings.json, emits boundary receipt.
Tiebreaker synthesis produces tiebreaker_payload.json with reducer promotion, emits boundary receipt.
Every batch payload aggregated into a single execute_payload; promoted to review fan-in as items source.
Execute approval gate clears destructive confirmation and operator approval. Emits evidence-only receipt via _emit_execute_boundary_receipt before batch dispatch.
Execute approval denial when confirmation or operator approval missing. Evidence-only receipt before CliError propagation.
One batch completed successfully; additional batches remain. Emitted via _emit_batch_boundary_receipt.

entries.transition: worker timeout within retry budget → retry
entries.description: Worker/transient timeout within retry budget; retry the batch or escalate to override.

entries.transition: no review needed → terminal or awaiting_human_verify
entries.description: Robustness skips review (bare or light without deferred must criteria); terminates directly or awaits human verification.
Batch blocked by quality gates; routes to override for recovery. Emitted via _emit_batch_boundary_receipt.

entries.transition: fresh session required → new execute session
entries.description: Retry requires a fresh worker session; forces new execute session.
Terminal or continuation projection visible in finalize policy metadata and durable plan artifacts.
Finalize publishes canonical plan artifacts declared by the artifact contract.
Revise fallback evidence persisted as declarative contract rather than hidden finalize branch.
Cap exhaustion outcomes carry explicit authority records instead of handler-owned decisions.
Review fanout children produce durable outputs for the visible review fan-in reducer.
Deferred-human review records suspension and resume evidence without becoming a route table.
Authored review fan-in promoted child outputs into canonical review payload.
Review-directed rework cycle projects durable re-execute intent without privately routing it.
Halting the plan requires a durable authority record bound to the exact state snapshot being aborted.
Execution adoption anchored to the exact execution/finalize artifacts being adopted.
Bypassing a blocking gate or review verdict records who accepted the debt against which durable evidence set.
Protected actions and explicit human gates record actor, role, scope, and fresh evidence.
Resuming from blocked binds recovery to the declared resume cursor and blocker evidence.
Restarting the planning loop records the exact prior state and freshness token that authorized re-entry.
Leaving a clarification halt records the answers and freshness token that unlocked plan.
Waiver or deferred-human suspension carries durable authority evidence separate from handler-private state changes.
Ticket management handler for plan-level ticket tracking. Maintenance-owned lifecycle surface.
Verifiability checks for plan artifacts. WBC-owned evaluation surface.
